overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit city center. The player character walks along a sidewalk and crosses a wide intersection surrounded by towering buildings covered in dynamic digital billboards and holographic advertisements reflecting off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city sidewalk with towering neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk toward a major intersection, with neon billboards illuminating the path

entered.detail: tall building facade covered in digital screens with prominent blue 'FOURTHWALL' signage
skyscraper with vertical strips of changing colored neon lights cycling through blue, green, and red
multiple large illuminated advertisement screens covering the building facade
rain-soaked concrete pavement reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings
tall street light pole with warm white illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking along a wet sidewalk in a dense cyberpunk city at night. The 'FOURTHWALL' building dominates the view ahead with its massive digital billboards, while a neon-lit tower pulses with colored lights on the left. The rain-slicked pavement mirrors the vibrant neon glow of the advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide pedestrian crosswalk with yellow striped markings

events.description: steps off the sidewalk onto the marked crosswalk, entering the wide intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide multi-lane intersection, moving from the sidewalk into the street crosswalk

notable_agents.action: female pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the right side of the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the sidewalk onto a wide crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes. The Fourthwall building shifts to the right as the perspective opens into the intersection. A pedestrian walks ahead on the right, and the neon tower looms larger on the left with its colors cycling dynamically.

scene_state.functional_zone: center of wide intersection surrounded by neon skyscrapers

events.description: passes a pedestrian crossing in the opposite direction through the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing across the intersection toward the far side, navigating through sparse pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white top and dark pants crossing from right to left in front of the camera

segments.scene_description: Deep in the wide intersection, the camera continues across the rain-reflective crosswalk. The Fourthwall building recedes to the right rear while the neon tower moves further left. A pedestrian in white crosses the path from right to left, and the expansive intersection reveals more of the surrounding neon-lit architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow, rain-slicked sidewalk into the expansive heart of a neon-lit city intersection. It begins by walking toward the massive digital billboards of the Fourthwall building, with a pulsing neon tower on the left reflecting vibrant colors onto the wet pavement. As the camera transitions onto a wide crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes, the perspective opens up, shifting the Fourthwall building to the right while the cycling lights of the tower loom larger. The scene then expands further into the deep intersection, where the surrounding architecture reveals itself as the camera passes a pedestrian in white. Finally, the Fourthwall building recedes into the background as the view fully encompasses the rain-reflective expanse of the glowing urban center.
